name: Odd-Eyes Arcray Dragon
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>覇</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>は</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>王</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>おう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>天</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>てん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>龍</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>りゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>オッドアイズ・アークレイ・ドラゴン
name_jp_tl: Supreme King Celestial Dragon Odd-Eyes Arcray Dragon
desc:
[ Pendulum Effect ] 
If you have 2 cards in your Pendulum Zones: You can Special Summon this card, then you can apply this effect.
● Shuffle 1 card from your Pendulum Zone into the Deck, then if it was added to your Extra Deck, you can Special Summon it, ignoring its Summoning conditions.
You can only use this effect of "Odd-Eyes Arcray Dragon" once per turn.

[ Monster Effect ] 
4 Dragon monsters (1 Fusion, 1 Synchro, 1 Xyz, and 1 Pendulum)
(This card is always treated as "Supreme King Z-ARC".)
This face-down card in the Extra Deck must first be either Fusion Summoned, or Special Summoned by Tributing 1 Level 12 DARK "Supreme King Z-ARC". If this card is Special Summoned from the Extra Deck: You can place 1 Pendulum Monster from your Deck in your Pendulum Zone. If this card in the Monster Zone is destroyed: You can place this card in your Pendulum Zone.

arc: <!-- The name condition makes it so that this is never treated as an Odd-Eyes card. Do not add that to this list -->
action: Returns from your field to your Deck
Places from Deck to Pendulum Zone
summoning: Special Summons itself from your Pendulum Zone
Special Summons from your Extra Deck
Requires Fusion Monsters as Fusion Materials
Requires Synchro Monsters as Fusion Materials
Requires Xyz Monsters as Fusion Materials
Requires Pendulum Monsters as Fusion Materials
Can be Special Summoned either by Fusion Summon or Contact Fusion
Contact Fusion without listed Fusion Materials
Special Summons itself from your Extra Deck
